message:
feat(vm-image): switch from static IP to DHCP

Replace hardcoded static IP configuration with DHCP in systemd-networkd.
The stockyard daemon's dnsmasq server will now assign IP addresses
dynamically. Retains MMDS route for Firecracker metadata access.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -210,19 +210,22 @@ datasource:
     metadata_urls: ["http://169.254.169.254"]
 EOF
 
-# Configure network for Firecracker MMDS access
-# Static IP on 192.168.100.0/24 network, plus route to 169.254.169.254 for MMDS
-# The IP will be set by cloud-init, but we need the MMDS route to be available early
+# Configure network for DHCP with MMDS route
+# IP is obtained via DHCP from stockyard daemon's dnsmasq
+# MMDS route is added for Firecracker metadata access
 RUN mkdir -p /etc/systemd/network \
     && cat > /etc/systemd/network/10-eth0.network <<'EOF'
 [Match]
 Name=eth0
 
 [Network]
-Address=192.168.100.2/24
-Gateway=192.168.100.1
+DHCP=yes
 DNS=8.8.8.8
 
+[DHCP]
+UseDNS=false
+UseRoutes=true
+
 [Route]
 Destination=169.254.169.254/32
 Scope=link
